title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
summary: Dune data shows Tether's USDT has become crypto’s dominant payments stablecoin while Circle's USDC powers DeFi, highlighting how blockchain choice shapes stablecoin use.

title: Tether invests in Mercado Bitcoin as blockchain finance expands in Latin America
summary: Mercado Bitcoin will use the funding to expand tokenized finance across Latin America, adding to Tether's growing portfolio of infrastructure investments.

title: NATO Agrees to $50 Billion in Defense Deals to Placate Trump
summary: NATO allies have agreed to at least $50 billion in defense industry deals to show US President Donald Trump that Europe is heeding his spending demands. title: Amazon’s New Bonds Get Cooler Reception as AI Debt Floods Market
summary: When Amazon.com Inc. sold its biggest ever bond earlier this year, it was inundated with investor orders amid hype about the artificial intelligence boom. This time around, there’s less fanfare.

title: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
summary: Built on Signal’s open-source technology, Radar Chat combines encrypted messaging with self-custodial Bitcoin payments via Lightning Network.

title: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
summary: The Capital Markets Authority wants to monitor over 20 blockchains for fraud, laundering, and sanctions evasion under Kenya's new crypto law.

title: ZEC jumps 12% as Zcash nears mathematical proof against hidden counterfeit bugs
summary: Project Tachyon outlined new details of its verification effort for Zcash's upcoming Ironwood shielded pool.

title: SBI Holdings is sole investor in crypto platform EDX Markets’ $76 million Series C
summary: Institutional crypto platform EDX Markets has closed a $76 million Series C funding round, with Japan's SBI Holdings as the sole investor.
